cases.description: Parallel agent dispatch for independent tasks triggers the skill
cases.prompt: dispatch agents to implement the frontend and backend components in parallel
expectations: Identifies the independent tasks that can run in parallel
Creates separate agent tasks for each component
Defines clear boundaries and interfaces between tasks
Monitors and collects results from all agents

cases.description: Large implementation split across files triggers subagent orchestration
cases.prompt: use subagents to implement the user management system: models, services, controllers, and tests
expectations: Assigns each area to a separate agent
Defines the shared types/interfaces before dispatching
Verifies all agents complete before integration
Breaks the module into parallelizable components

cases.description: Sequential plan execution should trigger plan-executor, not subagent-dev
cases.prompt: execute the implementation plan step by step
expectations: Does NOT invoke the subagent-dev skill

cases.description: Single, non-parallelizable task should NOT trigger subagent-dev
cases.prompt: add error handling to the payment service
expectations: Does NOT invoke the subagent-dev skill
Does NOT spin up parallel agents for a single task
